stemHtml: The angle of attack of a two dimensional wing section is the angle between…

options.a: the fuselage core line and the free stream direction.
options.b: the chord line of the aerofoil and the fuselage centreline.
options.c: the chord line of the aerofoil and the free stream direction.
options.d: the chord line and the camber line of the aerofoil.
